tool_name: Cantilever Retaining Wall — Overturning, Sliding, Bearing & Global Stability Check

inputs.name: Wall Base Width (B)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Backfill Friction Angle (φ_b)
inputs.note: Compacted granular fill ≈ 32–38°; gravel ≈ 35–42°; sandy silt ≈ 28–32°
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 Table 3 — Angular tolerance class 'm': ±0°20' for >50mm side

inputs.name: Backfill Unit Weight (γ_b)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Uniform Surcharge on Retained Surface (q_s)
inputs.note: Highway: 10–20 kPa; railway: 20–50 kPa; construction traffic: 12 kPa per AASHTO
inputs.uncertainty_source: IEC 61298-2:2008 §4.2 — Transducer accuracy class 1.0: ±1% of span

inputs.name: Base-Soil Friction Angle (φ_base)
inputs.note: Concrete on soil: δ = 2/3·φ_soil; rough concrete on gravel: δ ≈ φ_soil
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 Table 3 — Angular tolerance class 'm': ±0°20' for >50mm side

inputs.name: Allowable Bearing Pressure of Foundation Soil (q_allow)
inputs.note: From geotechnical investigation; sand ≈ 150–300 kPa; gravel ≈ 300–600 kPa; clay varies widely
inputs.uncertainty_source: IEC 61298-2:2008 §4.2 — Transducer accuracy class 1.0: ±1% of span

formulas: phi_rad = phi_backfill_deg * Math.PI / 180; Ka = Math.pow(Math.tan(Math.PI/4 - phi_rad/2), 2)  // Rankine Active Earth Pressure Coefficient (Ka) — Ref: Ka = tan²(45 − φ/2) — Rankine (1857); valid for horizontal backfill with no wall friction

Pa_soil_kn_m = 0.5 * Ka * gamma_backfill_kn_m3 * Math.pow(wall_height_m, 2); Pa_surcharge_kn_m = Ka * surcharge_kpa * wall_height_m; Pa_total_kn_m = Pa_soil_kn_m + Pa_surcharge_kn_m  // [kN/m] — Total Active Thrust & Surcharge Force (per unit length) — Ref: P_a = ½·K_a·γ·H² + K_a·q_s·H — EN 1997-1 §9.5.2; forces per unit wall length

M_OT = Pa_soil_kn_m * wall_height_m/3 + Pa_surcharge_kn_m * wall_height_m/2; W_wall_kn_m = wall_concrete_kn_m3 * base_width_m * 0.3; W_soil_kn_m = gamma_backfill_kn_m3 * wall_height_m * (base_width_m * 0.6); M_R = (W_wall_kn_m + W_soil_kn_m) * base_width_m / 2  // [kN·m/m] — Overturning Moment & Restoring Moment (about toe) — Ref: Moments about toe; W_wall = γ_c × B × t_stem (t=0.3 B approx); M_R = W × B/2 — NAVFAC DM-7.2 §5.2
OTF = M_R / M_OT  // Overturning Safety Factor (OTF) — Ref: OTF ≥ 2.0 static (ASCE 7 / EC7 DA1-1); ≥ 1.5 seismic — required minimum varies by code

phi_base_rad = phi_base_deg * Math.PI / 180; W_total = W_wall_kn_m + W_soil_kn_m; F_resist = W_total * Math.tan(phi_base_rad); SSF = F_resist / Pa_total_kn_m  // Sliding Safety Factor (SSF) — Ref: SSF = W·tan(δ) / P_a — EN 1997-1 §6.5.3; minimum SSF ≥ 1.5 (static)

W_total_kn_m = W_wall_kn_m + W_soil_kn_m; e = base_width_m/2 - (M_R - M_OT)/W_total_kn_m; q_max_kpa = W_total_kn_m/base_width_m * (1 + 6*e/base_width_m)  // [kPa] — Maximum Bearing Pressure Under Footing (q_max) — Ref: q_max = N/B × (1 + 6e/B) — eccentric loading; e = eccentricity from centroid — EC7 §6.5.4

rules.message: Overturning safety factor < 1.5: wall will overturn — increase base width, add heel extension, or install ground anchor
Sliding safety factor < 1.2: wall will slide — add base key, increase base width, or install batter piles
Maximum bearing pressure exceeds allowable: foundation failure risk — widen base, reduce eccentricity, or improve ground by compaction or piling

smart_warnings.message: OTF < 2.0: EN 1997-1 DA1 requirement not met for permanent structures — increase base width to B ≥ 0.6H for typical granular backfill
Sliding SF < 1.5: marginal — NAVFAC DM-7.2 requires SSF ≥ 1.5; add shear key 300 mm deep at front third of base for significant resistance improvement
High surcharge on weak backfill: active pressure substantially elevated — verify drainage behind wall; waterlogged granular fill can reach K_0 = 1.0
High wall with marginal OTF: seismic loading will reduce OTF further — ASCE 7 §11 seismic lateral earth pressure adds 50–100% to static thrust; perform seismic analysis
Bearing pressure > 80% of allowable: settlement risk under sustained surcharge — monitor differential settlement; consider ground improvement if soft soil detected below

fmea.effect: Overturning safety factor < 1.5: wall will overturn — increase base width, add heel extension, or install ground anchor
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Sliding safety factor < 1.2: wall will slide — add base key, increase base width, or install batter piles
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Maximum bearing pressure exceeds allowable: foundation failure risk — widen base, reduce eccentricity, or improve ground by compaction or piling

fmea.failureMode: OTF < 2.0: EN 1997-1 DA1 requirement not met for permanent structures — increase base width to B ≥ 0.6H for typical granular backfill
Sliding SF < 1.5: marginal — NAVFAC DM-7.2 requires SSF ≥ 1.5; add shear key 300 mm deep at front third of base for significant resistance improvement
High surcharge on weak backfill: active pressure substantially elevated — verify drainage behind wall; waterlogged granular fill can reach K_0 = 1.0
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: surcharge_kpa > 20 && phi_backfill_deg < 28

fmea.failureMode: High wall with marginal OTF: seismic loading will reduce OTF further — ASCE 7 §11 seismic lateral earth pressure adds 50–100% to static thrust; perform seismic analysis
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: wall_height_m > 6 && OTF < 2.5

fmea.failureMode: Bearing pressure > 80% of allowable: settlement risk under sustained surcharge — monitor differential settlement; consider ground improvement if soft soil detected below
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: q_max_kpa > q_allow_kpa * 0.8
